events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario describes caliper guide pins that are dry/seized during a brake service. This is a defect - guide pins must be lubricated with proper brake grease to function. Seized pins cause uneven braking, premature pad wear, and potential safety issues. This is non-compliant with OEM specs and shop practice.

  "rationale": "Dry/seized caliper guide pins are an installed defect that compromises brake function and safety. OEM specs and standard shop practice require guide pins to be cleaned and lubricated with appropriate brake grease during service. The work cannot pass at rough-complete stage until pins are freed, lubricated, and verified to slide freely.",
